prompt: A cinematic first-person visual novel game interface showing a warm morning breakfast scene in a shared apartment dining room, photographed with a slightly wide-angle lens and shallow depth of field. Two young women sit across a wooden table in soft golden sunlight pouring through large sheer-curtained windows on the left. The woman on the left has messy tied-up hair, a gray tank top, and a loose cardigan slipping off one shoulder, leaning back casually with one arm behind her head. The woman on the right has long dark hair and wears an oversized cream knit sweater, resting her face in her hands and leaning toward the table. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. On the table are 2 breakfast plates clearly visible: one plate in front of the left woman with pasta or salad-like food, and one large plate in front of the right woman with several slices of toast; there is also a second breakfast dish near the right side with 2 fried eggs. Include 2 mugs, 1 small glass, a clipboard with papers and a pen in the lower left foreground, a small black camera near the bottom center-right, and a vase with white flowers in the lower right foreground. The room feels cozy and lived-in, with wood furniture, a doorway in the back center, kitchen shelving and chairs in the background, and sunlit reflections across the floor and tabletop. Add a polished Chinese interactive story game HUD overlay. Top left: a dark rounded title pill with a home icon and the text "环景心动计划", plus a smaller pill reading "第一章", followed by the scene title "合租公寓的早晨" and a smaller location label "餐厅". Left side vertical stats panel with exactly 5 stacked buttons showing: "路线 未锁定", "事业 32", "真诚 38", "压力 38", "信任均值 30". Top right: exactly 4 compact rounded buttons labeled "关系", "回忆", "存档", "设置". Near the center-bottom over the table, add a small floating location tag reading "天文馆景想". Along the bottom, place a dark translucent dialogue box with a speaker name label "旁白" and the text "第二天早晨，你在餐桌中央醒来般坐下。水果、咖啡、合同、舞鞋、手柄和景程围成一圈。" with a small next-arrow button on the right. Overall style: realistic cinematic game screenshot, intimate domestic atmosphere, soft bloom, muted beige and brown palette, premium narrative app UI, immersive and emotionally suggestive.
